channel.title: Add YouTube Channel
channel.description: Enter the YouTube channels to monitor. Use the channel ID (e.g. `UCxxxxxx`) or the handle (e.g. `@MrBeast`). Separate multiple channels with a comma or a new line.

data.max_videos: Number of latest videos to fetch (1-50)

latest.title: Add Latest Feed
latest.description: Creates a cross-channel feed with the most recent videos from all your configured channels, sorted by date.

error.no_channels: Please enter at least one channel.
